ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the monitoring site */,
  "poc" INTEGER /* Parameter occurrence code */,
  "daily_max_8_hour_co_concentration" REAL /* Daily maximum 8-hour carbon monoxide concentration */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., ppm) */,
  "daily_aqi_value" INTEGER /* Daily Air Quality Index (AQI) value */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "daily_obs_count" INTEGER /* Number of daily observations */,
  "percent_complete" INTEGER /* Percentage of data completeness */,
  "aqs_parameter_code" INTEGER /* AQS parameter code */,
  "aqs_parameter_desc" TEXT /* Description of the AQS parameter */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Core-Based Statistical Area (CBSA) code */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the CBSA */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring site */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring site */,
  "data_capture_method" TEXT /* Method used to capture the data */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for data collection */,
  "quality_control_check" INTEGER /* Indicates if quality control check was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_county_code FOREIGN KEY ("county_code") REFERENCES counties ("county_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES cbsas ("cbsa_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_aqs_parameter_code FOREIGN KEY ("aqs_parameter_code") REFERENCES aqs_parameters ("aqs_parameter_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring site */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring site */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code where the site is located */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code where the site is located */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Core-Based Statistical Area (CBSA) code */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of monitoring site (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the monitoring site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbsas" (
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CBSA */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the CBSA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqs_parameters" (
  "aqs_parameter_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQS parameter */,
  "aqs_parameter_desc" TEXT /* Description of the AQS parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqs_parameter_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., AQS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_access_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used to access the data (e.g., API, FTP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data entry being validated */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the data */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "validation_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., sensor, monitor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_equipment" (
  "site_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site-equipment association */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed */,
  "removal_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_equipment_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "upload_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_upload_by FOREIGN KEY ("upload_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import event */,
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the import was performed */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("data_file_id")
)
